prompt: Create a black-and-white manga page illustration in a single tall, slightly tilted rectangular panel on a white background. The scene shows an elegant young woman from a dramatic low-angle perspective, leaning over the viewer with her right hand reaching forward in extreme foreshortening, fingers spread and sharp dark nails visible. She has light gray shoulder-length messy hair with long bangs, loose strands flowing across her face, large narrow manga eyes with detailed lashes, a calm but intimidating expression, and slightly parted lips. She wears a dark high-collared uniform under a draped cloak or haori with textured screentone shading and a bold dark flame-like pattern near the lower right edge. Use delicate ink linework, pencil-like crosshatching, manga screentones, high contrast black fills, sparse dust speckles, and clean white negative space. Include exactly 1 speech bubble: a tall vertical oval bubble on the upper right, with Japanese vertical text reading 風林火山を殺し進む. Keep the composition monochrome, cinematic, and intense, like a printed shonen/seinen manga panel, with no color and no extra panels.
